examples: Now most people know the da da da dah introduction.
"Yes!" Htan Dah said. "If they are caught, they could die."
Spoken clearly, the sounds “dah” and “bah” are easy to distinguish.
Dah Wing Wah is the place to go for the village cuisine of the northern New Territories.
Dana (pronounced DAH-nah) bottles wines from three distinctive vineyards, each vinified in its own winery-within-the-winery.
